atomicity.message: Staged changes map to the OXP prompt export content-hash/divergence bead plus its tracker closure.

conditions.message: Final staged prompt-export slice is formatted and passes focused and full staged-only Go tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 verified final hash b59a90e2, git diff --cached --check, gofmt no output, focused prompt-export command tests, internal prompt/hash/export tests, and full go test ./... in a staged-only temporary tree.

conditions.message: Prompt export behavior is centralized in the internal helper and CLI only routes/output-formats it.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 inspected internal/backpressure/prompt_export.go helper functions and cmd/burpvalve/main.go runPromptsShow delegation; tests cover repeated states without parallel implementation.

conditions.message: Final staged payload does not create a second authoritative prompt source or let local export drift silently satisfy the prompt contract.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2880 verified final hash b59a90e2, inspected git diff, reproduced local-edit refusal and force overwrite, and confirmed .beads closure addition does not weaken the judgment.

conditions.message: The new branches have nearby CLI behavior tests and helper-level hash/divergence tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 inspected cmd/burpvalve/prompts_test.go and internal/backpressure/prompt_export_test.go covering write creation, idempotence, refusal, force, warning, repair boundary, metadata, hash, and local modification.

conditions.message: Final staged payload satisfies the bead acceptance criteria and closes the prompt-export bead.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2880 verified br show closed state, staged .beads closure, and clean final staged snapshot tests: focused prompt-export CLI tests, internal prompt/hash/export tests, and go test ./....

conditions.message: Verifier evidence records final staged hash, file list, static inspection, focused tests, full tests, and formatting/check evidence.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 recorded final staged hash b59a90e2, staged path list, git diff --cached --check, gofmt, focused CLI/internal tests, and full go test ./... evidence.

conditions.message: Final staged payload is scoped to prompt-export code/tests plus tracker closure.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2880 inspected git diff --cached --name-status and confirmed staged files are .beads/issues.jsonl plus cmd/burpvalve/main.go, cmd/burpvalve/prompts_test.go, internal/backpressure/prompt_export.go, and internal/backpressure/prompt_export_test.go; unrelated work remains unstaged.

conditions.message: The only governed write surface is explicit prompt export under docs/prompts/<name>.md, with refusal of local edits unless --force.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 inspected WritePromptExport write calls, found no remove/rename/network/shell behavior in the helper, verified refusal/force/repair tests, and smoke-tested an explicit temp-root --write.

conditions.message: Export metadata and content hash protect local copies from silent divergence, and Beads metadata is limited to the prompt-export closure.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 inspected formatPromptExport, PromptBodyHash, PromptExportStatusFor local modification logic, staged .beads closure diff, and focused content hash/divergence tests.

conditions.message: Prompt exports are constrained to the selected root docs/prompts area and add no shell, network, or broad filesystem behavior.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2880 inspected filepath.Join(root, docs/prompts, name+.md), known embedded prompt names from ShowPrompt, os.MkdirAll/os.WriteFile usage, conservative parse-error handling, and no executable behavior in .beads closure.

conditions.message: No governed visual regression surface exists in this staged payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 verified staged paths are .beads/issues.jsonl plus Go source/test files only, with no browser UI, screenshot surface, canvas, responsive layout, visual asset, or terminal layout change requiring visual regression review.

conditions.message: The feature adds bounded single-file prompt export reads/writes and one rendered-body hash per invocation.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2881 inspected PromptExportStatusFor and WritePromptExport single-file operations, runPromptsShow one prompt status check, and full staged-only go test ./... evidence.

conditions.message: File mutation requires explicit --write and local edits require explicit --force to overwrite.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2880 inspected ordinary prompts show warning-without-mutation behavior, local-edit refusal without --force, force acceptance, and repair docs prompt export non-mutation coverage.
